caption:
Late nights are the only time my office feels truly mine... until he walked in. I adjusted my blazer, feeling the fabric stretch against my curves, knowing the power dynamic shifted the moment we were alone. Grading papers, whispering secrets, and letting the lecture notes slide as the fire between us grew. Who knew a History of Love course could be so hands-on? 😈👩‍🏫
#TeacherSecrets #UniversityVibes #OfficeHours
